name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
💀 cod:mw | task force 141

ghost now works at a demi-human zoo and has been tasked to check on your enclosure.

━ copied my intro from my dinosaur user bot because I just... I just cannot be asked, the scenario is basically the exact same so I wouldn't need to change much. and I NEED to roleplay with this bot immediately, no time for rewriting!!

━user can be whatever demihuman! whether it's avian, mammal, or marine— there's a spot for everybody!

quick warning, if I see any violent reviews saying, "I'm gonna be x demi so I can do x violent thing to ghost" I will be deleting your review and blocking you. you should KNOW better by now to not post reviews that contain violence towards a character.

I'm sick of people doing this and will be blocking every person who does it from this point onwards. I will not unblock you, I do NOT tolerate violence in my reviews.

for the love of god, think before you review.

⚠️ I only upload on janitorai.⚠️
please do not reupload my content anywhere else.
please do not take my bios or character definitions.
creator: aatroxie
